title: cx-workflow Config Schema
description: Configuration schema for .claude/cx/config.json — cx-workflow plugin settings

version.description: Config schema version for future migration compatibility

developer_id.description: Developer identifier (prefix for feature directories and git commits)
notes: Set during cx-init, typically GitHub username or short name
Used to prefix feature directories: features/alice-payment-system
Allows multiple devs to work in same repo with separate feature directories

definitions.off: No GitHub integration; all artifacts local only
definitions.local: Dev locally; cx-summary creates one summary Issue at end
definitions.collab: PRD + Design Docs as Issues immediately; execution local; summary Issue + PR at end
definitions.full: All artifacts (PRD, Design, ADR, Plan, Summary) as Issues; team alignment at each stage

current_feature.description: Currently active feature slug (empty string if none)
notes: Set by cx-prd when starting new feature
Used to load context on SessionStart hook
Cleared after cx-summary completes

agent_teams.description: Enable Agent Teams mode for frontend/backend parallel work with contract alignment
notes: When true: cx-exec spawns separate frontend-agent and backend-agent
Both agents follow same design.md contracts
SubagentStop hook validates outputs match contract
Experimental feature; requires Claude Code Agent Teams support

background_agents.description: Allow background agents to run GitHub sync operations asynchronously
notes: When true: cx-summary GitHub operations (create Issue, PR) run in background
When false: all GitHub operations block until complete
Useful for slow networks or large repos

code_review.description: Enable smart code review workflow after cx-exec completion
notes: When true: cx-exec completion triggers AskUserQuestion for review options
Options: Full audit / Quick check / Skip
When false: skip review, proceed directly to cx-summary
Full audit uses code-reviewer and code-cleanup subagents

enabled.description: Enable automatic code formatting after file writes

notes: auto: detect from project (package.json / pyproject.toml / go.mod)
prettier: JavaScript/TypeScript/JSON/YAML
black: Python
gofmt: Go

session_start.description: Enable SessionStart hook (loads current feature context)

pre_compact.description: Enable PreCompact hook (saves context snapshot before compaction)

prompt_refresh_interval.description: Number of conversation turns between target refresh injections
notes: Every N turns, UserPromptSubmit hook injects: 'Current task: #{id}, Remaining: X'
0 = disable prompt injection

stop_verify.description: Enable Stop hook (verify no in_progress tasks before user disconnect)

post_edit_format.description: Enable PostToolUse hook (auto-format code after file writes)

notification.description: Enable desktop notifications on task completion
notes: Supports: macOS (osascript), Linux (notify-send), WSL (powershell)
Notifies on: cx-exec batch completion, cx-fix completion
Auto-approved: git add/commit/push, gh issue/pr, npm test, pytest, cargo test
Other commands: require user confirmation

examples.description: Team config (GitHub collab mode, code review, agent teams enabled)
Full transparency config (all GitHub, frequent prompts, no background ops)

notes: This schema describes .claude/cx/config.json, created and maintained by cx-workflow
Do NOT edit directly unless you know what you do; use /cx-config command instead
github_sync modes: off (pure local) → local (summary issue) → collab (design review) → full (all issues)
All boolean settings default to true for safety and visibility
Agent Teams and Background Agents are experimental; enable only if needed
